auth.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var id='myx';var p=c.providers.get(id);if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.isReadyToTrade().then(function(r){return JSON.stringify({provider:id,ready:r.ready,authenticatedAddress:r.authenticatedAddress||null})})})()

markets.description: MYX markets with prices (expect SGLT on testnet)

oracle-price.description: Oracle price for first MYX pool
oracle-price.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;var p=c.providers.get('myx');if(!p)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX provider'});return p.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(r){if(!r.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no markets'});return JSON.stringify({symbol:r[0].symbol,price:r[0].price})})})()

pre-trade.description: Snapshot: position count + account balances (before trade)

post-trade.description: Snapshot: position count + account balances (after trade, same shape as pre-trade)

place-order.description: Place a market buy on first MYX market (0.05 size, 10x leverage)
place-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){var myx=markets.filter(function(m){return m.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=myx[0];return c.placeOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'market',size:'0.05',leverage:10,usdAmount:'120',maxSlippageBps:500,currentPrice:parseFloat(m.price)}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

close-position.description: Close first open MYX position (full close)
close-position.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getPositions().then(function(positions){var myx=positions.filter(function(p){return p.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var p=myx[0];return c.closePosition({symbol:p.symbol,size:p.size}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

cancel-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){var myx=orders.filter(function(o){return o.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});var o=myx[0];return c.cancelOrder({orderId:o.orderId,symbol:o.symbol}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

cancel-all-orders.description: Batch cancel all open MYX orders
cancel-all-orders.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){var myx=orders.filter(function(o){return o.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});return c.cancelOrders({orders:myx.map(function(o){return{orderId:o.orderId,symbol:o.symbol}})}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

update-tpsl.description: Set TP/SL on first MYX position (TP=+10%, SL=-5% from entry)
update-tpsl.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getPositions().then(function(positions){var myx=positions.filter(function(p){return p.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var p=myx[0];var entry=parseFloat(p.entryPrice);var tp=String(entry*1.10);var sl=String(entry*0.95);return c.updatePositionTPSL({symbol:p.symbol,takeProfitPrice:tp,stopLossPrice:sl}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

add-margin.description: Add $10 margin to first MYX position
add-margin.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getPositions().then(function(positions){var myx=positions.filter(function(p){return p.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX positions'});var p=myx[0];return c.updateMargin({symbol:p.symbol,amount:'10'}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

edit-order.description: Edit first open MYX order (update price by +1%)
edit-order.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getOpenOrders().then(function(orders){var myx=orders.filter(function(o){return o.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX open orders'});var o=myx[0];var newPrice=String(parseFloat(o.price)*1.01);return c.editOrder({orderId:o.orderId,newOrder:{symbol:o.symbol,isBuy:o.side==='buy',orderType:o.isTrigger?'stop':'limit',size:o.size,price:newPrice}}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()
